commit_scope: Expose the browser FMF field runtime proof on the public Form playground and require it in deploy verification.

commands: cd web && npm test -- form-kernel-client.test.ts form-kernel-field-runtime.test.ts
local_validation.notes: The browser runtime proof executes four checks and publishes field-model-form-browser-runtime-proof:4 plus sequence-lift-project-fieldStep on /substrate/form.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public /substrate/form exposes the browser FMF runtime proof marker and deploy verification fails if it disappears.
test_flows: cd web && npm test -- form-kernel-client.test.ts form-kernel-field-runtime.test.ts

phase_gate.reason: Public browser runtime proof is wired; production verification remains pending until deployment reaches this commit.

evidence_refs: web/lib/form-kernel/field-runtime.ts exports runFieldRuntimeProof(), executing lift/project, fieldStep, intervention/reverseReceipt, diffusion, and conflict residual checks.
web/app/substrate/form/_components/FormPlayground.tsx exposes field-model-form-browser-runtime-proof:4 and the runtime check list as public proof markers.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh now requires the browser runtime proof marker and sequence-lift-project-fieldStep token from public /substrate/form HTML or chunks.
